hero.description: Comprehensive workplace health & safety system built for DR Congo enterprises. Manage medical examinations, risk assessments, incident reporting, and regulatory compliance — all in one platform.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Comprehensive tools for occupational health management

risk.name: Risk Assessment
risk.desc: Identify and manage workplace risks systematically

compliance.name: Compliance Tracking
compliance.desc: ISO 45001, ILO standards, and local regulations

documentation.name: Documentation Management
documentation.desc: Centralized storage for all health records

modules.title: Industry-Specific Tools
modules.subtitle: Purpose-built modules for every occupational health testing discipline — configured for your workplace standard.

benefits.title: Built for DR Congo Enterprises
benefits.subtitle: Designed for the unique needs of occupational health management in Central Africa
benefits.efficiencyDesc: Automate repetitive tasks, reduce paperwork, and streamline health reporting workflows.
benefits.complianceDesc: Stay aligned with ISO 45001, ILO conventions, and local DR Congo regulations.
benefits.safetyDesc: Proactively manage workplace risks and prevent incidents before they occur.
benefits.dataDesc: Data-driven decisions with real-time dashboards and comprehensive analytics.

compliance.title: Standards & Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Built to meet international occupational health standards
compliance.isoDesc: Fully aligned with the international standard for occupational health and safety management systems.
compliance.iloDesc: Adheres to International Labour Organization conventions for worker health and safety.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Workplace Health?
cta.subtitle: Join organizations across DR Congo managing occupational health the smart way.
cta.item1Desc: Professional onboarding and training for your team from day one.
cta.item2Desc: Dedicated support team available round the clock in French & English.
cta.item3Desc: Enterprise-grade hosting with automatic backups and 99.9% uptime.
cta.item4Desc: Auto-generated reports for ISO 45001, ILO, and DR Congo regulations.

gallery.title: Built for the Industries That Drive DRC
gallery.subtitle: From mining sites to healthcare facilities, KATMS helps organizations across sectors protect workers and stay compliant with regulations.

footer.tagline: Management system for pharmacy, hospital operations, and occupational health. Designed in Lubumbashi, built for Africa.
